Revenue Recovery

How much are claim denials costing you?

The average independent primary care practice loses $40,000–$120,000 per year to preventable claim denials. Sophia fixes that in two ways.

Denial Prevention — Front End

50–60% of all claim denials come from front-end errors — wrong insurance on file, expired coverage, or missing prior authorization. Sophia verifies insurance on every single intake call, catching these errors before they ever become denied claims.

Average savings per practice
$2,400/mo
In prevented front-end denials
Denial Recovery — Back End

For denials that do come through, Sophia's Pro plan includes automated denial management — AI detects the denial reason, corrects the claim, and resubmits automatically. No staff time. No lost revenue sitting in AR.

Average recovered per practice
$4,800/mo
In recovered denied claims (Pro plan add-on)
Total average ROI with Sophia Pro
$7,200/mo recovered
The Problem

Independent primary care is losing revenue it doesn't know about

67%
of patients hang up if put on hold

And they don't always call back. Every unanswered call is a patient lost to a competitor down the street.

$45,000+
/year for a full-time receptionist

And they still take lunch breaks, call in sick, and can't handle peak call volume — leaving patients on hold and appointments unbooked.

Crisis calls
can't wait on hold

Sophia recognizes urgent symptom language and immediately routes callers to 911 or your on-call provider — so no urgent situation is ever mishandled by voicemail.

Features

Everything your front desk needs — automated

Sophia handles the entire patient journey from first call to scheduled appointment, 24/7.

24/7 Inbound Call Coverage

Every call answered. No voicemail. No hold music. No missed patients — day or night.

Direct EMR Scheduling

Books directly into Athena, Tebra, eClinicalWorks, Elation, and DrChrono. Your calendar fills itself while you focus on care.

Real-Time Insurance Verification

Sophia verifies benefits during the call so patients know their coverage before they hang up.

Claims Submission & Denial Recovery

Sophia submits clean claims automatically and recovers denied ones — fixing and resubmitting without your staff lifting a finger. Most practices recover $2,000–$8,000/month in previously lost revenue.

Outbound Lead Calling

Sophia calls your leads automatically and follows up until they book — no manual outreach needed.

Crisis Detection & Transfer

Recognizes urgent symptom language — chest pain, difficulty breathing, severe symptoms — and instantly routes callers to 911 or your on-call provider. Every time, without hesitation.

Primary Care Workflows

Beyond scheduling — Sophia runs your whole front office

Primary care has more recurring workflows than any other specialty. Sophia automates all of them.

Prescription Refill Routing

When a patient calls for a refill, Sophia collects the medication name, dosage, and preferred pharmacy, then routes a task directly to your staff — no phone tag, no sticky notes, no missed requests.

Lab Result Follow-Up Calls

Sophia makes outbound calls to notify patients their results are ready and prompts them to schedule a follow-up visit. Primary care runs on this workflow — now it runs without staff involvement.

Annual Wellness Visit Reminders

Sophia auto-calls patients overdue for their annual physical using batch outbound calling. Most practices leave $30,000–$80,000/year on the table from missed wellness visits. Sophia recovers it.

Referral Coordination

Sophia collects specialist information, confirms referral appointments, and follows up with patients by phone — closing the referral loop without your front desk making a single call.

Chronic Care Check-Ins

Automated outbound calls to diabetic, hypertension, and chronic care patients between visits — checking medication adherence, symptoms, and whether they need to come in. Proactive care without proactive effort.

31-Language Support

Sophia speaks 31 languages fluently — so every patient in your community gets the same quality experience, regardless of what language they call in. No interpreter, no callback. Just answered.

How It Works

From first ring to booked appointment

Three steps. Zero effort from your team.

1
Patient calls your existing number

No new phone number required. Sophia forwards directly from your current line — setup in under an hour.

2
Sophia handles intake, scheduling & insurance in real time

Collects name, DOB, insurance, appointment type, provider preference — and verifies benefits live.

3
Appointment booked, claim submitted automatically

Your EMR updated instantly. Your team wakes up to a full calendar, verified insurance, and zero missed calls.

No More Busy Signals

20 patients call at 8am.
All 20 get answered.

Primary care's worst bottleneck is the morning rush — everyone calls at once after sleeping on a symptom. A human receptionist handles 1 call at a time. Maybe transfers to a second line. Sophia runs 20 simultaneous, fully independent conversations in parallel. Every caller gets their own Sophia instance. No busy signal. No hold music. No voicemail. Not one missed call.

Unlimited simultaneous calls — no capacity ceiling
Each caller gets a fully independent Sophia — not a shared queue
31 languages — each caller heard in their own language
Works nights, weekends, and holidays — no overtime, no callbacks
8:03 AM — Monday morning
Maria G. — Refill request ● Live
James T. — Appointment (Spanish) ● Live
Linda P. — Insurance question ● Live
Robert K. — Lab result follow-up ● Live
+ 16 more simultaneous calls ● Live
Busy signals today 0
A human receptionist handles 1 call at a time. Sophia handles all of them simultaneously — each caller gets their own independent conversation.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about Sophia AI.

Yes. Sophia pulls balance information directly from your EMR and sends warm, thoughtful text reminders to patients on your behalf. What used to require an uncomfortable phone call from your front desk now happens automatically, keeping your revenue flowing while preserving the trust your patients have in your practice.
Yes — fully. Sophia is built on HIPAA-compliant infrastructure and a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) is included with every plan at no extra charge. All call data is encrypted in transit and at rest, and we never store protected health information beyond what's required.
Absolutely. You keep your existing phone number — no porting, no new lines. Sophia integrates via a simple call-forwarding setup that takes under an hour. Your patients always see and call the same number they're used to.
Yes. Sophia integrates directly with Athenahealth, Tebra, eClinicalWorks, Elation Health, DrChrono, and more. Appointments are booked straight into your EMR calendar — no double-entry, no manual follow-up.
Each plan includes 1,500 minutes per month. Beyond that, overage is billed at $0.20/min — and you can see exactly how much you'll owe before the month ends using the pricing calculator above. There are no setup fees, no contracts, and no surprise charges.
Yes — Sophia answers calls 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including nights, weekends, and holidays. That means a patient who finally works up the courage to call at 10pm on a Sunday gets a real, helpful response — not voicemail.
Sophia recognizes urgent symptom language — chest pain, difficulty breathing, severe pain — and immediately routes the caller to 911 or your designated after-hours line. For non-emergency urgent concerns, Sophia captures the patient's information and notifies your on-call provider automatically, so nothing falls through the cracks overnight or on weekends.
A full-time receptionist costs $45,000+ per year — and can only work business hours. Sophia starts at $550/month (under $6,600/year) and works 24/7 without sick days, turnover, or training costs. Most practices recover the cost within the first few booked appointments.
Most practices are live within 24–48 hours of signing up. Setup involves connecting your existing phone number via call forwarding and linking your EMR — our onboarding team walks you through every step. There's no IT department required.
